'''''Star Wars'' 16''' is the sixteenth issue of [[Star Wars: Republic|''Star Wars'']] and the fourth part of the ''[[Star Wars: Emissaries to Malastare]]'' story arc. The comic was written by [[Timothy Truman]], illustrated by [[Tom Lyle]] and [[Jan Duursema]], and published through [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[March 22]], [[2000]].

==Publisher's summary==
''As Lannik terrorists and Ffib priests prepare to wipe out half of the Jedi Council, the Jedi must ask themselves: is there any hope for peace, or was this a ruse all along? The answer lies somewhere among the rocky flats and methane pools of Malastare, but so does death, and for one of the team, life will never be the same again!''<ref name="Dark Horse" />

==Plot summary==
As half of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] envoy fall, seemingly to their [[Death/Legends|deaths]], the others dive in for a quick rescue. Now aware of the [[Red Iaro/Legends|Red Iaro]] treachery, the Jedi return to the palace, just in time. As they expected, the [[Lannik (species)/Legends|Lannik]] [[R'cardo Sooflie IX|prince]] is being held hostage, and his captors have let a pair of ferocious [[Akk dog/Legends|akk dogs]] loose on him. While the Jedi incapacitate the dogs, the [[Myk'chur Finux Zug|terrorist leader]] attempts to escape via [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]], but is sucked into the engine of one of the [[Podracing/Legends|podracers]]. [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], upset at the exploitation of the akks, which come from his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]], sets out to find the [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] responsible.
